location.name: Art appraisers in Denver, Colorado
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Denver, Colorado.

listedAppraisers.name: Alicia Weaver
listedAppraisers.description: Alicia Weaver provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Antiques, Furnishings, Decorative Arts, Insurance Appraisals, Estate Planning. With Over 10 years experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in European Art, American Art, Contemporary, Modern, Impressionist, 19th Century Works. With Decades experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: The Antique Trader - Denver
listedAppraisers.description: The Antique Trader provides affordable, professional antique and personal property appraisals for individuals, private collectors, attorneys, and businesses in the Denver area. Utilizes extensive research materials and online resources to deliver accurate, up-to-date fair market valuations.

listedAppraisers.name: Bernard Ewell Art Appraisers, LLC.
listedAppraisers.description: Bernard Ewell Art Appraisers, LLC. offers fine art appraisal services serving Denver, CO. Contact the business directly to confirm current service area, qualifications, fees, report type, and scheduling before engagement.

listedAppraisers.name: Brady L. Dreasher
listedAppraisers.description: Brady L. Dreasher provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Fine Art Brokerage, Estate Liquidation, Expert Witness Testimony. With Since 2000 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Candace A Hill - Worthwise Appraisers
listedAppraisers.description: Candace Hill is a certified personal property appraiser through the International Society of Appraisers (ISA), holding the highest credential of CAPP. Based in the greater Boulder/Denver area, she provides expert appraisals for fine art, antiques, furnishings, and decorative arts.
